---
title: "03. Differential Expression"
params: 
  se_dir: "data/se.rds"
  out_plots_dir: "plots"
  out_data_dir: "data"
  filtered_data_dir: "filtered"
output:
  html_document:
    theme: cerulean
    toc: yes
    toc_float: yes
    smooth_scroll: yes
  pdf_document:
    toc: yes
---

```{r setup}
suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(SummarizedExperiment)
  library(edgeR)
  library(ggplot2)
  library(patchwork)
  library(data.table)
  library(viridis)
  library(PCAtools)
  library(SEtools)
  library(DESeq2)
  library(haven)
  library(sechm)
  library(patchwork)
})

set.seed(42)

# Color-blind friendly palettes
cbbPalette <- c("#E69F00", "#56B4E9", "#009E73", "#F0E442", 
                "#0072B2", "#D55E00", "#CC79A7")
outDataDir <- params$out_data_dir
outPlotDir <- params$out_plots_dir
```

## Overview Plots

### Import SE

```{r, se}
seDir <- params$se_dir
se <- readRDS(seDir)
```

### Normalization

```{r}
dds <- edgeR::calcNormFactors(DGEList(assay(se), 
                                      group=as.factor(se$isActivated)), 
                              method="TMMwsp")
assays(se)$logcpm <- log1p(cpm(dds))
dds <- dds[filterByExpr(dds, min.count=1, min.prop=0.5),] # group=se$isActivated
```

#### Surrogate variable analysis

```{r, error=TRUE}
se$batch <- as.factor(as.character(se$batch))
se$isActivated <- as.factor(se$isActivated)

# numSVmethod="leek" provided zero, default 2 SVs, 
# decided based on PCA plot of corrected counts which removed the strong lib size effects
se <- se[rowSums(assays(se)$counts>0)!=0,]
se <- SEtools::svacor(se, form=~isActivated+batch,
                          form0=~batch, 
                          method="svaseq", 
                          n.sv=1)
pcaCor <- pca(assays(se)$corrected, removeVar = 0.1)
pcaCorDt<- cbind(pcaCor$rotated[,paste0("PC", 1:10)], colData(se))

ggplot(pcaCorDt, aes(x=PC1, y=PC2, color=isActivated))+
geom_point(size=2)+
scale_color_manual(values=cbbPalette)+
theme_bw()

ggplot(pcaCorDt, aes(x=PC1, y=PC2, color=batch))+
geom_point(size=2)+
scale_color_manual(values=cbbPalette)+
theme_bw()

mdsDims <- plotMDS(dds, labels=se$isActivated)[c("x", "y")]
mdsDt <- as.data.table(mdsDims)
colnames(mdsDt) <- c("MDS1", "MDS2")
svDt <- cbind(as.data.table(colData(se)), mdsDt, colSums(assays(se)$counts)) #se$SV1, se$SV2
setnames(svDt, c("V3"), c("lib_size"))
cor(svDt$SV1, svDt$Clean_Reads)

ggplot(svDt, aes(x=MDS1, y=MDS2, color=SV1))+
geom_point(size=2)+
scale_color_viridis_c()+
theme_bw()

ggplot(svDt, aes(x=MDS1, y=MDS2, color=isActivated))+
geom_point(size=2)+
scale_color_manual(values=cbbPalette)+
theme_bw()

ggplot(svDt, aes(x=MDS1, y=MDS2, color=as.factor(batch)))+
geom_point(size=2)+
scale_color_manual(values=cbbPalette)+
theme_bw()

cor(svDt$SV1, svDt$Clean_Reads)
cor(svDt$SV1, svDt$lib_size)
```

## 1. Discrete condition: Differential expression analysis

```{r, error=TRUE}
mm <- model.matrix(~SV1+batch+isActivated, data=as.data.frame(colData(se)))
dds <- estimateDisp(dds, mm)

edgeR::plotBCV(dds)

lrt <- as.data.frame(topTags(glmQLFTest(glmQLFit(dds,mm, coef="isActivatedpos"), 
                                        coef="isActivatedpos"), Inf))
lrt$feature <- row.names(lrt)
rowData(se)$DEA.group_analysis <- lrt[match(rownames(se), lrt$feature),]
attr(rowData(se)$DEA.group_analysis, "description") <- "Group comparsion: Activated (pos) vs non-activated (neg) cells"
```

Volcano Plot
```{r, error=TRUE}
lrt <- setorder(lrt, FDR)
lrtTop <- head(lrt, 4)
lrtTop10 <- head(lrt, 10)
lrtPrior <- subset(lrt, feature %in% c("mmu-mir-128-1",
                                       "mmu-mir-128-2", 
                                       "mmu-mir-138-1",
                                       "mmu-mir-138-2"))

ggplot(lrt, aes(logFC,-log10(FDR), label=feature, colour=logCPM))+ 
  scale_colour_viridis_c(direction=-1)+
  geom_vline(xintercept=-0.5, linetype="dashed")+
  geom_vline(xintercept=0.5, linetype="dashed")+
  geom_hline(yintercept=-log10(0.05), linetype="dashed")+
  geom_point(size=2)+ 
  geom_text_repel(data=subset(lrt, feature %in% lrtTop$feature),
                                aes(x=logFC, y=-log10(FDR), 
                                    label=feature), 
                                    color="black",
                                    max.overlaps = Inf,
                                    box.padding = 0.5,
                                    key_glyph = "point")+
  geom_text_repel(data=subset(lrt, feature %in% lrtPrior$feature),
                                aes(x=logFC, y=-log10(FDR), 
                                    label=feature), 
                                    color="darkgrey",
                                    max.overlaps = Inf,
                                    box.padding = 0.5,
                                    key_glyph = "point")+
  ggtitle("Volcano Plot: Discrete condition (activated vs non-activated)")+
  theme_bw()
ggsave(file.path(outPlotDir, "02.1_volcano_plot_discrete.png"),
       device="png", width=20, units="cm")

ggplot(lrt, aes(logFC,-log10(PValue), label=feature, colour=logCPM))+ 
  scale_colour_viridis_c(direction=-1)+
  geom_vline(xintercept=-0.5, linetype="dashed")+
  geom_vline(xintercept=0.5, linetype="dashed")+
  geom_hline(yintercept=-log10(0.05), linetype="dashed")+
  geom_point(size=2)+ 
  geom_text_repel(data=subset(lrt, feature %in% lrtTop$feature),
                                aes(x=logFC, y=-log10(PValue), 
                                    label=feature), 
                                    color="black",
                                    max.overlaps = Inf,
                                    box.padding = 0.5,
                                    key_glyph = "point")+
  geom_text_repel(data=subset(lrt, feature %in% lrtPrior$feature),
                                aes(x=logFC, y=-log10(PValue), 
                                    label=feature), 
                                    color="darkgrey",
                                    max.overlaps = Inf,
                                    box.padding = 0.5,
                                    key_glyph = "point")+
  ggtitle("Volcano Plot: Discrete condition (activated vs non-activated)")+
  theme_bw()
ggsave(file.path(outPlotDir, "02.1_volcano_plot_discrete_pval.png"),
       device="png", width=20, units="cm")
```

```{r, error=TRUE}
se$isActivated <- as.factor(colData(se)$isActivated)
se <- se[,order(colData(se)$isActivated)]
rowData(se)$isTop <- fifelse(rownames(rowData(se)) %in% lrtTop10$feature, 
                              "top 4", "preselected")

png(filename=file.path(outPlotDir, "02.1_heatmap_cpm_discrete.png"), 
    width=3.25,height=3.25,units="cm",res=1200)
pdf(file=file.path(outPlotDir, "02.1_heatmap_cpm_discrete.pdf"))
sechm(se, c(row.names(lrtTop), row.names(lrtPrior)), 
      top_annotation=c("isActivated", "batch"),
      gaps_row="isTop",
      do.scale = TRUE, 
      show_rownames=TRUE, 
      row_names_gp=grid::gpar(fontsize=9))
dev.off()

png(filename=file.path(outPlotDir, "02.1_heatmap_cor_discrete.png"), 
    width=3.25,height=3.25,units="cm",res=1200)
pdf(file=file.path(outPlotDir, "02.1_heatmap_cor_discrete.pdf"))
sechm(se, c(row.names(lrtTop), row.names(lrtPrior)), 
      top_annotation=c("isActivated", "batch"),
      gaps_row="isTop",
      do.scale = TRUE, 
      show_rownames=TRUE, 
      assayName = "corrected",
      row_names_gp=grid::gpar(fontsize=9))
dev.off()
```

Provide as a list
```{r, error=TRUE}
lrt[order(lrt$PValue),]
lrt$n_cells_found <- rowSums(assays(se)$counts[rownames(lrt),]>0)
lrt$mean_counts <- rowMeans(assays(se)$counts[rownames(lrt),])
lrt$name <- rownames(lrt)
write.table(lrt, file=file.path(outDataDir, "02.1_miRNA_found.csv"), sep=",", 
            quote=FALSE, row.names=FALSE)
```

## Session info

```{r}
sessionInfo()
```
